subject: New Request: Go Developer – Go
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: FlexTel
ROLE: Senior Go Developer
START: 2025-07-09
DURATION: 6 months
LOCATION: Malmö / remote
RATE: 1025 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Go, Azure and Oracle.

Key requirements:

  • Go
  • Azure
  • Oracle

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Peter Nilsson
Account Manager
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 72 678 90 12
